name: Convict
description:
iron lung; simon/the convict— you’re stuck in there with him

two intros!

1: open ended, when he first gets sent down

2: more of a specific scenario, when he’s sent back down for the skeleton sample. he’s angry about it and convinced he’s supposed to take it out on you

i maybe got some minor details or lore stuff inaccurate, but it shouldn’t affect it too much. i haven’t programmed the reason he’s in there into him, nothing ab eden or anything, just a quick summary of the world. if you want more in depth rp you’re free to add stuff to the chat memory i just didn’t want to use up tokens on stuff I didn’t personally need

if the bot keeps forgetting you’re stuck in one tiny area and trying to go to different rooms i’m sorry i did the best I could 🥀

have fun :)
creator: mosslight
